base.label: Base Case
base.description: 8-week conflict, moderate oil premium, standard escalation

adverse.label: Adverse
adverse.description: 16-week conflict, elevated oil premium, standard escalation

severe.label: Severe
severe.description: 26-week conflict, high oil premium, intensified escalation

fujairah_pipeline.description: Habshan-Fujairah pipeline operational status. When destroyed, exportVolumeFactor drops to 0.05.

pure_bull.description: Brand fully recovers, minimal permanent absorption. Tests whether duration alone prevents fast V.

pure_bear.description: High permanent brand discount, high absorption, high departure. Tests how bad the L-shape gets.

uae_as_combatant.description: UAE drawn into active military operations. Tests windfall paradox breaking point.

fujairah_destroyed.description: Habshan-Fujairah pipeline destroyed. Tests flat-critical infrastructure dependency.
fujairah_destroyed.notes: Collapses windfall mechanism. SWF deployment severely constrained. Confirms Fujairah as flat-critical node.

compressed_assessment.description: UAE pre-positions reconstruction contracts during conflict. Tests policy intervention impact.
compressed_assessment.notes: Modeled via higher physical recovery rate rather than shorter assessment delay (equivalent effect)

tourism.notes: AND-gated on aviation. High brand sensitivity. Low departure stickiness.

aviation.notes: Longest assessment delay. Gates tourism recovery. Sequential dependencies.

finance.notes: Highest departure stickiness. Relocated legal domiciles don't reverse quickly.

realEstate.notes: Transactions freeze, not values. Moderate stickiness.

oil.notes: Price-driven. Fujairah dependency modeled as binary toggle.
